label: USGS - Large earthquakes by magnitude
query:
SELECT place, mag, time, latitude, longitude
FROM earthquakes
WHERE mag > 4.5
ORDER BY mag DESC
LIMIT 25

label: USGS - Recent California earthquakes
query:
SELECT place, mag, time
FROM earthquakes
WHERE place LIKE '%CA%' AND time > '2023-01-01'
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 20

label: USGS - Shallow earthquake count by region
query:
SELECT place, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM earthquakes
WHERE depth < 10.0
GROUP BY place
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 15

label: NOAA - High temperature stations
query:
SELECT STATION, DATE, TMP, DEW
FROM weather
WHERE TMP > 30.0
ORDER BY TMP DESC
LIMIT 20

label: NOAA - Average temperature by station
query:
SELECT STATION, AVG(TMP) AS avg_temp, MIN(TMP) AS min_temp, MAX(TMP) AS max_temp
FROM weather
GROUP BY STATION
ORDER BY avg_temp DESC
LIMIT 15

label: NOAA - Days with large pressure drops
query:
SELECT STATION, DATE, SLP
FROM weather
WHERE SLP < 1005.0
ORDER BY SLP ASC
LIMIT 20

label: AWID - Strong signal devices
query:
SELECT wlan_sa, radiotap_dbm_antsignal, class
FROM wifi_network
WHERE radiotap_dbm_antsignal > -50
ORDER BY radiotap_dbm_antsignal DESC
LIMIT 25

label: AWID - Normal traffic by MAC prefix
query:
SELECT SUBSTR(wlan_sa, 1, 8) AS mac_prefix, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM wifi_network
WHERE class = 'normal'
GROUP BY mac_prefix
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 15

label: AWID - Attack signal distribution
query:
SELECT radiotap_dbm_antsignal, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM wifi_network
WHERE class = 'attack'
GROUP BY radiotap_dbm_antsignal
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20

label: Products - Top-selling items
query:
SELECT category, product_name, price, stock_qty
FROM products
WHERE stock_qty > 0
ORDER BY price DESC
LIMIT 30

label: Products - Average price by category
query:
SELECT category, AVG(price) AS avg_price, COUNT(*) AS product_count
FROM products
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY avg_price DESC
LIMIT 20

label: Products - Low stock alerts
query:
SELECT product_name, category, stock_qty
FROM products
WHERE stock_qty < 10
ORDER BY stock_qty ASC
LIMIT 25

label: Orders - High-value recent orders
query:
SELECT order_id, customer_id, total_amount, order_date
FROM orders
WHERE total_amount > 500.0
ORDER BY order_date DESC
LIMIT 30

label: Orders - Monthly revenue summary
query:
SELECT STRFTIME('%Y-%m', order_date) AS month, SUM(total_amount) AS revenue, COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM orders
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month DESC
LIMIT 24

label: Orders - Top customers by spend
query:
SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) AS order_count, SUM(total_amount) AS total_spend
FROM orders
GROUP BY customer_id
ORDER BY total_spend DESC
LIMIT 20

label: Orders - Pending high-value orders
query:
SELECT order_id, customer_id, total_amount
FROM orders
WHERE status = 'pending' AND total_amount > 200.0
ORDER BY total_amount DESC
LIMIT 20

label: USGS - SELECT * variant
query: SELECT * FROM earthquakes WHERE mag > 4.0

label: USGS - Missing predicate (full scan)
query: SELECT place, mag, time FROM earthquakes ORDER BY mag DESC

label: USGS - Non-sargable YEAR() predicate
query: SELECT place, mag, time FROM earthquakes WHERE YEAR(time) = 2024 ORDER BY mag DESC LIMIT 20
expected_issue: Function on indexed column prevents index seek

label: USGS - DISTINCT instead of GROUP BY
query: SELECT DISTINCT place, mag FROM earthquakes ORDER BY mag DESC
expected_issue: DISTINCT used where GROUP BY is more appropriate

label: NOAA - Cross join variant
query:
SELECT w1.STATION, w1.TMP, w2.TMP AS TMP2
FROM weather w1, weather w2

label: NOAA - Missing LIMIT on ordered query
query: SELECT STATION, DATE, TMP FROM weather WHERE TMP > 25.0 ORDER BY TMP DESC
expected_issue: Unbounded result set from missing LIMIT

label: NOAA - Implicit type coercion
query: SELECT STATION, DATE, TMP FROM weather WHERE STATION = 10010099999 AND TMP > 25.0

label: AWID - Nested subquery variant
AWID - OR instead of IN
query:
SELECT wlan_sa, class, radiotap_dbm_antsignal
FROM wifi_network
WHERE class = 'normal' OR class = 'attack' OR class = 'unknown'
ORDER BY radiotap_dbm_antsignal
expected_issue: Multiple OR conditions instead of IN list

label: AWID - LIKE with leading wildcard
query: SELECT wlan_sa, class FROM wifi_network WHERE wlan_sa LIKE '%:ff'

label: Products - SELECT * with full scan
query: SELECT * FROM products

label: Products - Missing GROUP BY column
query: SELECT product_name, category, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM products GROUP BY category
expected_issue: GROUP BY does not include all non-aggregate columns

label: Products - Non-sargable string function
query: SELECT product_name, price, category FROM products WHERE LOWER(category) = 'electronics' ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 20
expected_issue: Function on indexed column prevents index seek

label: Orders - UNION instead of UNION ALL
query:
SELECT order_id, total_amount FROM orders WHERE status = 'pending'
UNION
SELECT order_id, total_amount FROM orders WHERE status = 'shipped'
ORDER BY total_amount DESC LIMIT 30
expected_issue: UNION instead of UNION ALL (no duplicate removal needed)

label: Orders - Redundant subquery wrapping
query:
SELECT * FROM (
    SELECT order_id, customer_id, total_amount, order_date
    FROM orders WHERE total_amount > 100.0
) AS t WHERE total_amount > 200.0

label: Orders - Missing LIMIT with ORDER BY
query: SELECT order_id, customer_id, total_amount FROM orders ORDER BY total_amount DESC
expected_issue: Unbounded result set from missing LIMIT

label: USGS - Magnitude distribution
query: SELECT mag, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM earthquakes GROUP BY mag ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10

label: USGS - Deep earthquakes
query: SELECT place, mag, depth FROM earthquakes WHERE depth > 300 ORDER BY depth DESC LIMIT 15

label: USGS - Recent earthquakes by location
query: SELECT latitude, longitude, mag FROM earthquakes WHERE time > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) LIMIT 20

label: USGS - Earthquake frequency by month
query: SELECT STRFTIME('%Y-%m', time) AS month, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM earthquakes GROUP BY month ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT 12

label: USGS - High magnitude earthquakes
query: SELECT place, mag, time FROM earthquakes WHERE mag > 6.0 ORDER BY mag DESC LIMIT 10

label: NOAA - Temperature range by station
query: SELECT STATION, MAX(TMP) - MIN(TMP) AS temp_range FROM weather GROUP BY STATION ORDER BY temp_range DESC LIMIT 10

label: NOAA - High humidity days
query: SELECT STATION, DATE, DEW FROM weather WHERE DEW > 25.0 ORDER BY DEW DESC LIMIT 20

label: NOAA - Pressure variation
query: SELECT STATION, AVG(SLP) AS avg_pressure, STDDEV(SLP) AS pressure_std FROM weather GROUP BY STATION ORDER BY pressure_std DESC LIMIT 10

label: NOAA - Recent weather readings
query: SELECT STATION, DATE, TMP, DEW, SLP FROM weather WHERE DATE > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) LIMIT 25

label: NOAA - Temperature trends
query: SELECT STRFTIME('%Y-%m', DATE) AS month, AVG(TMP) AS avg_temp FROM weather GROUP BY month ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT 12

label: AWID - Signal strength distribution
query: SELECT radiotap_dbm_antsignal, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM wifi_network GROUP BY radiotap_dbm_antsignal ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 15

label: AWID - Device activity by class
query: SELECT class, COUNT(DISTINCT wlan_sa) AS device_count FROM wifi_network GROUP BY class ORDER BY device_count DESC

label: AWID - Strong signal attacks
query: SELECT wlan_sa, radiotap_dbm_antsignal FROM wifi_network WHERE class = 'attack' AND radiotap_dbm_antsignal > -60 ORDER BY radiotap_dbm_antsignal DESC LIMIT 10

label: AWID - MAC prefix analysis
query: SELECT SUBSTR(wlan_sa, 1, 8) AS prefix, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM wifi_network GROUP BY prefix ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 20

label: AWID - Signal strength by class
query: SELECT class, AVG(radiotap_dbm_antsignal) AS avg_signal FROM wifi_network GROUP BY class ORDER BY avg_signal DESC

label: Products - Category statistics
query: SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(price) AS avg_price, SUM(stock_qty) AS total_stock FROM products GROUP BY category ORDER BY cnt DESC

label: Products - High value items
query: SELECT product_name, category, price FROM products WHERE price > 1000 ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 15

label: Products - Stock levels
query: SELECT category, SUM(stock_qty) AS total_stock FROM products GROUP BY category ORDER BY total_stock DESC

label: Products - Price distribution
query: SELECT CASE WHEN price < 50 THEN 'Low' WHEN price < 200 THEN 'Medium' ELSE 'High' END AS price_range, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM products GROUP BY price_range ORDER BY cnt DESC

label: Products - Recent inventory
query: SELECT product_name, category, stock_qty, price FROM products WHERE stock_qty > 0 ORDER BY stock_qty DESC LIMIT 30

label: Orders - Customer order frequency
query: SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 20

label: Orders - Revenue by status
query: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS order_count, SUM(total_amount) AS total_revenue FROM orders GROUP BY status ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

label: Orders - High value customers
query: SELECT customer_id, SUM(total_amount) AS total_spend FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id HAVING SUM(total_amount) > 1000 ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 15

label: Orders - Monthly order count
query: SELECT STRFTIME('%Y-%m', order_date) AS month, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders GROUP BY month ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT 12

label: Orders - Average order value
query: SELECT AVG(total_amount) AS avg_order_value, MIN(total_amount) AS min_order, MAX(total_amount) AS max_order FROM orders

label: NOAA - SELECT * variant
query: SELECT * FROM weather WHERE TMP > 30

label: AWID - SELECT * with filter
query: SELECT * FROM wifi_network WHERE class = 'attack'

label: Orders - SELECT * variant
query: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE total_amount > 1000

label: NOAA - Missing predicate (full scan)
query: SELECT STATION, TMP FROM weather ORDER BY TMP DESC

label: AWID - Missing predicate (full scan)
query: SELECT wlan_sa, class FROM wifi_network ORDER BY radiotap_dbm_antsignal

label: Products - Missing predicate (full scan)
query: SELECT product_name, price FROM products ORDER BY price DESC

label: USGS - Cross join variant
query: SELECT e1.place, e1.mag, e2.place, e2.mag FROM earthquakes e1, earthquakes e2 WHERE e1.mag > 5

label: Products - Cross join variant
query: SELECT p.product_name, c.category FROM products p, products c WHERE p.price > 100

label: Orders - Cross join variant
query: SELECT o1.order_id, o2.order_id FROM orders o1, orders o2 WHERE o1.total_amount > 500

label: USGS - Redundant subquery variant
query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM earthquakes WHERE mag > 4) AS sub WHERE sub.depth < 20

label: NOAA - Redundant subquery variant
query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM weather WHERE TMP > 25) AS sub WHERE sub.SLP < 1010

label: Orders - Redundant subquery variant
query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM orders WHERE total_amount > 500) AS sub WHERE sub.status = 'pending'

label: NOAA - Non-sargable MONTH() predicate
query: SELECT STATION, DATE, TMP FROM weather WHERE MONTH(DATE) = 6
expected_issue: Function on indexed column prevents index seek

label: AWID - Non-sargable SUBSTR() predicate
query: SELECT wlan_sa, class FROM wifi_network WHERE SUBSTR(wlan_sa, 1, 5) = '00:11:22'
expected_issue: Function on indexed column prevents index seek

label: Orders - Non-sargable YEAR() predicate
query: SELECT order_id, total_amount FROM orders WHERE YEAR(order_date) = 2024
expected_issue: Function on indexed column prevents index seek

label: AWID - Missing LIMIT on ordered query
query: SELECT wlan_sa, radiotap_dbm_antsignal FROM wifi_network ORDER BY radiotap_dbm_antsignal DESC
expected_issue: Unbounded result set from missing LIMIT

label: USGS - OR instead of IN
query: SELECT place, mag FROM earthquakes WHERE place = 'California' OR place = 'Nevada' OR place = 'Oregon'
expected_issue: Multiple OR conditions instead of IN list

label: NOAA - OR instead of IN
query: SELECT STATION, TMP FROM weather WHERE STATION = '01001099999' OR STATION = '01002099999'
expected_issue: Multiple OR conditions instead of IN list

label: Products - OR instead of IN
query: SELECT product_name, category FROM products WHERE category = 'Electronics' OR category = 'Clothing'
expected_issue: Multiple OR conditions instead of IN list

label: USGS - LIKE with leading wildcard
query: SELECT place, mag FROM earthquakes WHERE place LIKE '%CA%'

label: Products - LIKE with leading wildcard
query: SELECT product_name, price FROM products WHERE product_name LIKE '%Widget%'

label: Orders - LIKE with leading wildcard
query: SELECT order_id, customer_id FROM orders WHERE status LIKE '%pending%'

label: USGS - Implicit type coercion
query: SELECT place, mag FROM earthquakes WHERE mag > 5

label: AWID - Implicit type coercion
query: SELECT wlan_sa, class FROM wifi_network WHERE radiotap_dbm_antsignal > -50

label: Orders - Implicit type coercion
query: SELECT order_id, total_amount FROM orders WHERE total_amount > 1000

label: NOAA - DISTINCT instead of GROUP BY
query: SELECT DISTINCT STATION, TMP FROM weather ORDER BY TMP DESC
expected_issue: DISTINCT used where GROUP BY is more appropriate

label: Products - DISTINCT instead of GROUP BY
query: SELECT DISTINCT category, price FROM products ORDER BY price DESC
expected_issue: DISTINCT used where GROUP BY is more appropriate

label: Orders - DISTINCT instead of GROUP BY
query: SELECT DISTINCT customer_id, total_amount FROM orders ORDER BY total_amount DESC
expected_issue: DISTINCT used where GROUP BY is more appropriate

label: USGS - UNION instead of UNION ALL
query: SELECT place, mag FROM earthquakes WHERE mag > 6 UNION SELECT place, mag FROM earthquakes WHERE depth < 10
expected_issue: UNION instead of UNION ALL (no duplicate removal needed)

label: NOAA - UNION instead of UNION ALL
query: SELECT STATION, TMP FROM weather WHERE TMP > 35 UNION SELECT STATION, TMP FROM weather WHERE TMP < 0
expected_issue: UNION instead of UNION ALL (no duplicate removal needed)

label: Products - UNION instead of UNION ALL
query: SELECT product_name, price FROM products WHERE price > 1000 UNION SELECT product_name, price FROM products WHERE price < 10
expected_issue: UNION instead of UNION ALL (no duplicate removal needed)

label: USGS - Missing GROUP BY column
query: SELECT place, mag, COUNT(*) FROM earthquakes GROUP BY place
expected_issue: GROUP BY does not include all non-aggregate columns

label: NOAA - Missing GROUP BY column
query: SELECT STATION, TMP, COUNT(*) FROM weather GROUP BY STATION
expected_issue: GROUP BY does not include all non-aggregate columns

label: AWID - Missing GROUP BY column
query: SELECT class, radiotap_dbm_antsignal, COUNT(*) FROM wifi_network GROUP BY class
expected_issue: GROUP BY does not include all non-aggregate columns
